steps.title: Identify the action
steps.content: The strongest clue is "place my keys on the bowl." This describes positioning something onto a surface — the target meaning is: to put something somewhere.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
The word "place" needs to mean setting something down on a surface — the narrator places keys on the bowl. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — Unlock: I unlock my keys on the bowl — unlock means to open a lock; keys are placed on the bowl as an object, not used to open anything here. ✗
  • Choice B — Put: I put my keys on the bowl — put means to set something in a location, matching the narrator setting keys down on the bowl's surface. ✓
  • Choice C — Remove: I remove my keys on the bowl — remove means to take away; the narrator is placing keys onto the bowl, not taking them away from it. ✗
  • Choice D — Rank: I rank my keys on the bowl — rank means to order by position or grade; it makes no sense to rank keys on a bowl. ✗
This matches choice B — B is correct.
